description_long: This is a yellow diamond-shaped traffic warning sign mounted on a tall, slender black post. The sign features a black pictogram depicting a car with rocks or debris falling from a cliff or slope, indicating a falling rocks hazard ahead. The sign face is flat and smooth, with a matte finish to reduce glare and enhance visibility. The rear of the sign is plain yellow, with no markings or text. The post appears to be made of metal, providing stability and durability for outdoor installation. This type of sign is commonly found on roads near cliffs, mountains, or areas prone to rockslides.
description: A yellow diamond warning sign on a black post, showing a car and falling rocks symbol to warn of rockslide hazards.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thin profile of the sign and post, with minimal detail visible.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the yellow diamond sign with a black car and falling rocks pictogram clearly visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the thin edge of the sign and post.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the plain yellow back of the sign and the black post.
attribute_symbol_or_pictogram: A black car with rocks or debris falling from a cliff or slope, indicating falling rocks hazard.
